title: allantodia maxima
intro: Allantodia maxima, also known as the greater allantodia, is a type of fern species native to East Asia, particularly in China and Japan, characterized by its tall and erect fronds. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Allantodia maxima include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal supplements or tinctures.
